title: podman restart filter test: sometimes returns empty string
body:
Flake reported by multiarch team, please see [original issue](https://gitlab.com/cki-project/kernel-tests/-/issues/701) for details.
```
+0022s] not ok 3 podman start --filter - start only containers that match the filter
[+0022s] # (from function `is' in file /usr/share/podman/test/system/helpers.bash, line 551,
[+0022s] #  in test file /usr/share/podman/test/system/045-start.bats, line 48)
[+0022s] #   `is "$output" "$cid"' failed
[+0022s] # # podman rm -t 0 --all --force --ignore
[+0022s] # # podman ps --all --external --format {{.ID}} {{.Names}}
[+0022s] # # podman images --all --format {{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}} {{.ID}}
[+0022s] # quay.io/libpod/testimage:20210610 d47f52704fad
[+0022s] # # podman run -d quay.io/libpod/testimage:20210610 /bin/true
[+0022s] # 6a30baeccbb0e1ff2b6d3ce3eb255ffabe167853c523341dda6d160cac56b378
[+0022s] # # podman start --filter restart-policy=always 6a30baeccbb0e1ff2b6d3ce3eb255ffabe167853c523341dda6d160cac56b378 CID of restart-policy=always container
[+0022s] # # podman start --filter restart-policy=none 6a30baeccbb0e1ff2b6d3ce3eb255ffabe167853c523341dda6d160cac56b378 CID of restart-policy=none container
[+0022s] # #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
[+0022s] # #|     FAIL: CID of restart-policy=none container
[+0022s] # #| expected: '6a30baeccbb0e1ff2b6d3ce3eb255ffabe167853c523341dda6d160cac56b378'
[+0022s] # #|   actual: ''
[+0022s] # #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
```
Relevant code: https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/db7cd88c6781c3d42376f02b5b1547c466c45d3e/test/system/045-start.bats#L47-L48

Best I can tell, this is `aarch64` but I don't know if that's relevant or not.

@boaz0 this is your code, PTAL

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
I've never seen this, it was reported by the [multiarch team](https://gitlab.com/cki-project/kernel-tests/-/issues/701). No further activity on that original issue, so I'll close.
